POSITIONTYPE, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(col30), '') AS DECIMAL(20,6)) AS COUPON_RATE, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(col31), '') AS INT) AS COUPON_DAYCOUNTCONV, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(col32), '') AS INT) AS COUPON_PAYMENTFREQ,
